nodes.name: La Mesa Ecopark
nodes.summary: La Mesa Ecopark是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Ashy-breasted flycatcher，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

nodes.name: Ashy-breasted flycatcher
nodes.summary: Ashy-breasted flycatcher（Ashy-breasted flycatcher，学名 Muscicapa randi），在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，已关联3个分布地点节点，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、森林砍伐。

nodes.name: 馬尼拉大都會
nodes.summary: 馬尼拉大都會是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Ashy-breasted flycatcher，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Balinsasayao Twin Lakes Natural Park
nodes.summary: Balinsasayao Twin Lakes Natural Park是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Pinsker's hawk-eagle、Ashy-breasted flycatcher，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It has also been found in the proposed area of Balinsasayao Twin Lakes Natural Park which has received conservation funding

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: In January 2026, it was found in La Mesa Ecopark in Metro Manila

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: In January 2026, it was found in La Mesa Ecopark in Metro Manila

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: This species' main threat is habitat loss with wholesale clearance of forest habitats as a result of legal and illegal logging, agricultural conversion and mining activities occurring within the range
